ItacPersonItem.Notes: Biringucci delivered an `Oratione sopra la Pace` in vernacular in the Intronati Academy, in the days after the Sienese rebels accepted the supremacy of Cosimo de` Medici (1559), as testified by Belisario Bulgarini in a letter to Flavio Figliucci. This `Oratione sopra la pace` has been traditionally attributed to Alessandro Piccolomini. See Ricco` 1989.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
